title: About
text:
Mia B. Franco is a graduate student in Forest Sciences at Colorado State University, Fort Collins. She is studying the longevity of fuel treatments. Outside of her work, she likes backpacking, running, and hiking.


University of California, Berkeley | Berkeley, CA
B.S. in Forest Ecology and Management
B.S. in Society and Environment
Ecosystem Management and Forestry Minor | Aug 2021 - December 2024
UC Berkeley Forestry Field Camp | Meadow Valley, California, United States | June 2022 - Aug 2022

Forest and Woodland Ecology Lab, UC Berkeley | Laboratory Technician | Oct 2023 - Dec 2024
Santa Rosa Junior College | Wildfire Mitigation Force Forest Intern | Jun 2023 - Aug 2023
California Department of Forestry and Fire Protection (CAL FIRE) | Forestry Aide | May 2023 - Aug 2023
Zero Waste Laboratory, UC Berkeley | Research Assistant | Jan 2022 - May 2022
